authDeleteErrorBeforeFix: Database error deleting user (observed in prior LOOP_1/3 cleanup attempts; root cause: non-cascaded user_roles.user_id FK referencing auth.users)
rootCauseFix: force-cleanup.mjs now deletes user_roles.user_id before auth.admin.deleteUser and records per-op diagnostics; the nonsensical case_members.delete().eq('case_id', userId) call was removed; cases.created_by (non-existent column) was removed from the owner filter.
fkSafeDeletionOrder: direct user-referencing child rows (case_comments.author_id, generated_documents.user_id, case_members.user_id, audit_logs.user_id, notifications.user_id, reminders.user_id, telegram_uploads.user_id, telegram_verification_codes.user_id, profile_compat_settings.user_id)
E2E-owned case children by case_id (case_comments, generated_documents, case_members, case_files, reminders)

baselineExpected.basis: empirically re-derived: total minus E2E-owned rows after orphan removal; matches the pre-LOOP clean state
